text.title: Competitor Tracker — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the matrix file shape + weekly delta-journal entry shape. Solo founder (or supporting agent) must satisfy these contracts.

forbidden.pattern: attribute added mid-week without monthly-refresh marker (r2)
delta entry where action.kind=action-queued but action.date is empty or > 30 days out
competitor in matrix not updated in any attribute for 90+ days AND not pruned at next monthly refresh (r5)
explicit-no-op entries that all share identical reasons ("not relevant") — signal of rubber-stamp

allowed-transformations.transformation: Cluster multiple small deltas from the same competitor in a single week into one journal entry with sub-bullets.
Carry forward "skipped channel" to next week with a 15-min catch-up budget — allowed once per channel per month.
Mark an attribute as "stable, monthly-check-only" if it shows no variance for 60+ days — reduces weekly scan time.

list.item: Each competitor influenced >= 1 decision in last 90 days OR pruned with reason (r5)
Schema attributes reviewed; low-variance attributes flagged or removed (r5)
New competitor candidates evaluated; max 1 added per month (r1)
Monthly journal entry written summarizing month's net learning
All channels in checklist marked scanned or explicitly skipped (r3)
Every delta has action OR explicit no-op (r4)
Output validates against templates/competitor-matrix.csv schema for the columns part, and journal markdown structure
